steps.title: Use the sine ratio
steps.content:
In the right triangle, segment $AB$ is opposite the $57^\circ$ angle, and $AC$ is the hypotenuse. Therefore
$$\sin(57^\circ)=\frac{AB}{AC}$$

steps.title: Solve for the segment
steps.content: The diagram uses $AC$ as the unit reference length, so $AC=1$. $$AB=AC\cdot \sin(57^\circ)$$ $$AB=\sin(57^\circ)$$ The answer is A.
